summary: The diff implements all 6 required features (REQ-1 through REQ-6) with reasonable coverage. The navigation bar, hero banner, stat cards, milk chart, recent entries panel, and farm-themed styling are all present. However, there are notable gaps: the nav bar background is white rather than dark green (REQ-6), the hero banner image asset is not added in the diff, the logo image asset is not added, and the cow emoji AC item cannot be verified due to truncation.

missing_requirements.requirement: The AO Farms logo should show a green cow head icon + 'A.O. Farms' text on the left
missing_requirements.reason: Layout.tsx references ao-farms-logo.dim_120x80.png as an image but no image assets appear in the ADDED FILES list. The logo image asset may be absent, with no inline SVG or text fallback for the green cow head icon.

missing_requirements.requirement: Farm landscape illustration rendered as banner background; cow emoji or icon appears next to the title
missing_requirements.reason: Dashboard.tsx is truncated so the hero banner implementation cannot be fully verified. The farm-hero-banner image asset (farm-hero-banner.dim_1400x300.png) is not present in ADDED FILES, making it unclear if the illustrated landscape background and cow emoji AC items are satisfied.

missing_requirements.requirement: Navigation bar uses dark green background
missing_requirements.reason: Layout.tsx explicitly sets the header to 'bg-white' (a white sticky nav bar), directly contradicting the requirement and its AC that the nav bar should use a dark green background.

hallucinated_features.description: Mobile hamburger menu with slide-down nav drawer
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only specifies desktop navigation behavior and nav links. Layout.tsx adds a mobile menu toggle using Menu/X icons and a collapsible mobile nav drawer, which was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Full dark mode CSS variable set
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request specifies a farm-themed light UI with specific colors but does not request dark mode support. index.css adds a complete '.dark' block with alternate OKLCH color variables.
